news.headline: Trump’s Pearl Harbour joke falls flat in Japan over his ‘disrespectful remarks’
news.summary:
People across Japan have recoiled in shock over US President Donald Trump’s joke about the attack on Pearl Harbour in the presence of Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi in the White House, perceiving the incident as an insult to a long-time ally of Washington.

news.headline: Trump compares US strikes on Iran to WWII Pearl Harbor attack
news.summary: During Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi's visit to Washington, Donald #Trump was asked why #US allies - including #Japan - were not involved in talks regarding strikes in #Iran before they happened. Trump said the reason was surprise, before asking why Japan hadn’t warned of the attack on Pear

news.headline: Iran hits Kuwaiti oil refinery as attacks on oil infrastructure continue
news.summary: Firefighters battled a blaze at a giant oil refinery in Kuwait on Friday after a fresh drone attack as Iran kept up a wave of strikes on its neighbours as it continues to target energy infrastructure in the Gulf region. France 24's regional correspondent Hoda Abdel-Hamid reports from Doha, Qatar.

news.headline: Mexican teen dies while being held in US immigration custody
news.summary: Royer Perez-Jimenez died amid a surge of migrant deaths under Donald Trump's immigration crackdown.

news.headline: Running on sunshine: Pakistan’s solar boom to tide over Middle East energy crisis
news.summary:
<p>Energy expert Vaqar Zakaria believes solar power makes “excellent economic sense” — and he lives by it. For over five years, his rooftop panels have slashed his bills, sometimes to zero, even allowing him to sell surplus electricity back through net metering.</p>

news.headline: Norway's crown princess breaks silence, claiming she was 'manipulated and deceived' by Epstein
news.summary: Crown Princess Mette Marit tells Norwegian TV she wishes she had never met the late sex offender.
